summary_en: Shin-Etsu Chemical completed post-adjustment settlement of ASR buyback initiated Feb 2026, acquiring 15.3M shares at average price of ¥6,543.41 per share.
title_en: Notification of Completion of Post-adjustment in Accelerated Share Repurchase (ASR)
translation_en_brief: Shin-Etsu Chemical announced on 20 May 2026 the completion of post-adjustment procedures for an Accelerated Share Repurchase (ASR) transaction initiated in February 2026. The final number of shares acquired was confirmed at 15,315,000 shares, including 229,200 shares purchased from parties other than Daiwa Securities. The average purchase price was ¥6,543.41 per share, calculated as the simple average of VWAP from 18 February to 19 May 2026 (multiplied by 99.9%). The total consideration was ¥98.7 billion based on the initial ToSTNeT-3 off-market transaction executed on 17 February 2026. The adjustment mechanism reduced the original tranche of 17,570,700 shares by 2,484,900 shares, with the adjustment method involving issuance of shares through warrant exercise to warrant holders.
